# SCORE Veteran Entrepreneurs Resource Hub

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, special-population

## Resource purpose
SCORE resource hub for veteran entrepreneurs.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when a user identifies as veteran, transitioning military, military spouse if relevant, or asks for veteran business resources.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
All stages, with special resource flag

## Route the user here when
The user has veteran-related eligibility/resource flags or is exploring veteran entrepreneurship resources.

## BOSS routing notes
- Do not guarantee veteran certification, contracting eligibility, loan approval, grants, or benefits; route to official resources and mentors.

## Related SCORE links
- Small Business Resource Hubs: https://www.score.org/small-business-resource-hubs/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
